      • Gaia is waiting for
      Archiarchy

      •  

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

      • Our Story

        The purpose of this website is to celebrate the amazing success of the Gaian Road Team, and to share the wealth of Nonmaterial Value we co-created while journeying together around the world for nine months from 2012 to 2013.

         

        Central to finding Treasures was our ongoing Edgeworker Interviews which we made everywhere we traveled. We now share these interviews with you as an abundance of heart-flowing creative resources.

         

        We hope you benefit from the natural connections we discovered as much as we enjoyed discovering them during the Gaian Road Team.

      • Gaian Road Team Purpose

        The Gaian Road Team was an open ended Quest to weave critical connections between communities of practice to strengthen the system of influence for the emergence of next culture - Archiarchy - the culture that naturally appears as you extract yourself from patriarchy in the same way a teenager extracts himself from his parents' house to grow up.

         

        Archiarchy is centered around ongoing authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes. It thrives on Nonlinear and Unreasonable creative collaboration between initiated adult women and initiated adult men.

         

        The Gaian Road Team served as a Seed crystal of Archiarchy, catalyzing change in the human ethnosphere. Archiarchy already exists. More and more Bridges are being established over which you, yourself, can take the four steps to Archiarchy.

      • Prelude

        On 17 September 2012, three Possibilitators from Germany hit the road for an extended experiment in radical collaboration with Gaia, the consciousness field of Earth. Our commitment was to serve as a free-agent team directed by the cultural-evolution wishes of Gaia.

         

        The idea is that by getting outside of our birth cultures and intentionally holding a space of Archiarchy - the radically collaborative culture of initiated adult women and initiated adult men - there will already exist a seed crystal for global culture shift.

         

        We received massive confirmation that our experiment was wanted and needed; connections and coincidences opened unexpected doors of further radical collaboration. New distinctions emerged daily and we recorded them as fast as possible.

         

        Our experiments included building community through what Robert Wolff - author of Original Wisdom - refers to as 'sharing and caring'.

         

        Our intention was to function, minute-by-minute, together in the culture evolving out of the ashes of the modern capitalist patriarchal empire. We have come to call this next culture 'Archiarchy'.

         

        To explain: what naturally emerges after the baby-level-responsibility of matriarchal cultures, and adolescent-level-responsibility of patriarchal cultures, is adult and radical-level-responsibility Archiarchal cultures.

         

        Since Archiarchy is the creative collaboration of initiated adult women and men, it has come to be that ongoing authentic initiatory process is the central value of Archiarchy. Fortunately Possibility Management has been developing Archiarchal thoughtware upgrades and initiatory processes since 1975, and makes them available through the Possibility Managers.

         

        Our group's Archiarchal field emerged through radical 5-body sharing and caring (physical, intellectual, emotional, energetic, and archetypal). (For more about Feeling and Relating in Archiarchy, please refer to the book Conscious Feelings by Clinton Callahan)

         

        We also began with the Purpose of delivering an invitation to certain countries to join the Gaian League (such as New Zealand, Ecuador, Bolivia, Costa Rica, Mauritius, Fiji, Iceland, etc.) as described in Ross Jackson's book Occupy World Street.

         

        What emerged out of these unreasonable commitments is an amazing Treasure which we joyously share with you here.

      • Glimpses

      • Gaian Edgeworkers

        As our tiny Gaian Road Team tuned in and listened to instructions from Gaia, each impulse led us to make inexplicably coincidental meetings with the Edgeworkers, Social Alchemists, Riftwalkers, Bridge Builders, and Possibilitators who are inventing and inhabiting next culture - Archiarchy.

         

        These remarkable beings commit to themselves, as much as to the novel outcomes they are creating. They trust discoveries from their own research and freely share everything they have learned for the benefit of all.

         

        We are so happy to finally be able to share these intimate conversations with so many radiant Beings from our Gaian Road Team Interviews around the world.

         

        We are so grateful for your vision, clarity, and possibility which you so generously shared.

        Alan Friedman

        Edgework Engineer

        Northern California

        <alan.only4tablet@gmail.com>

        Cinnamon Evans

        Culture-Shift Gameworld Spaceholder

        Melbourne, Australia

        ceres.org.au

         

        Gaian Road Team INTERVIEW: Live Differently

        youtu.be/1hDDYGIigsQ

        Cinnamon is the Spaceholder and CEO for the environmental education center, urban farm, and social enterprise hub called C.E.R.E.S. (Centre for Education and Research in Environmental Strategies). Founded in 1982, CERES is comprised of 4.5 hectares spread across four locations, linked by the Merri and Darebin Creeks on unceded Wurundjeri Country, Melbourne.

         

        CERES is one of Australia's most visited environmental education centers.

         

        The CERES vision is for people to fall in love with the Earth again.

        Huhana Smith

        Kaitiaki (Guardian) of the Wetlands

        Aotearoa (New Zealand)

        stuff.co.nz/environment/300400821/dr-huhana-smith-elected-as-cochair-of-horizons-climate-action-committee

        Book:

        E Tu Ake: Maori Standing Strong

        amazon.com/Tu-Ake-Maori-Standing-Strong/dp/1877385697/

        Huhana Smith, PhD (Ngäti Tükorehe, affiliated to Ngäti Raukawa ki te Tonga) is writer and scholar with expert knowledge of Mäori art and taonga tuku iho (valued ancestral treasures). She was Senior Curator Mäori at Te Papa from 2003 until December 2009 .

        Gaian Road Team INTERVIEW:

        youtu.be/UZ8Ybxqo15Q

        James Hudgell

        Culture-Evolution Agent

        Koh Payam, Thailand

        sabai-bungalows.com

        facebook.com/phayamparadise

         

        Gaian Road Team INTERVIEW:

        youtu.be/lV39jAKdgOc

        James Hudgell's project of creating a local school that welcomes Burmese children, Thai children, and Boat People's children together in the same classes - which are often taught by international travelers - has ended the intercultural feud that has been going on in the village for decades.

        We heard of James' experiment and suddenly had an impulse (...from Gaia?) to interview him. James was the Gaian Road Team's very first interviewee.

        Koh Phayam is hot and humid. Clinton was sweating like a waterfall, afraid of shorting out the microphone. Three dogs joined us in the open-air thatched-hut space, lying at our feet, as the interview was definitely the most interesting thing happening on this sleepy tropical Thai island.

        -----

        Anne-Chloé Destremau and Clinton Callahan visited James briefly at Sabai Bungalows in 2019. The place is just as beautiful as ever, and James is still at it! Thank you James Hudgell!

        Jennifer Welwood 

        Archiarchy Mage

        Mary Crowley

        Ocean Guardian (Kaitia)

        Gaian Road Team INTERVIEW (Deutsch Untertitel):

        youtu.be/WpvvVB06XEk
         

        Gaian Road Team INTERVIEW (English subtitles):

        https://youtu.be/nCJQ54152dA
         
         

        As an ardent environmentalist, Mary explores the world via her sailboat, the Kaisei, logging over 90,000 nautical miles. She was a teacher and program director for the Oceanic School of New York on board the 345′ Brigantine Statsraad Lehmkuhl for nine months, (a school year). She was also on the first voyage of S.E.A. of Woods Hole on board the Brigantine Westward as staff. She has sailed in the Galapagos archipelago 17 times as well as repeat visits to most of the world’s ocean areas.

        Peter Ellyard

        Future Builder

        Melbourne, Australia

        en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Peter_Ellyard

         

        Gaian Road Team INTERVIEW:

        Preferred Future: youtu.be/Xmuy2WMwTU8

        Initiations: youtu.be/EOPuFJRHQmY

        Peter Ellyard is former Executive Director for the Australian Commission for the Future.

        Chairman of the Preferred Futures institute and the Preferred Futures Group.

        Besides being a senior consultant to Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development for 20 years, Ellyard has been a Senior Adviser to the United Nations for more than 30 years, including to the 1992 Earth Summit where he was a senior advisor (the only Australian) on both the climate change and the biodiversity conventions.

        Peter is the author of the books Ideas for the New Millennium (1998, 2001) & more recently Designing 2050: Pathways to Sustainable Prosperity (2008). He is enlightening & thought provoking - helping the Synergy Team as an inspirational speaker, mentor coach & consultant.

        Gaian Road Team INTERVIEW:

        youtu.be/f_jWGYiMDtk

        Partnered with Trudy Bhaerman.

        Steve is an internationally known author, humorist, and workshop leader. For the past 33 years, he has written and performed as 'Swami Beyondananda', the "Cosmic Comic." Swami's comedy has been called "irreverently uplifting" and has been described both as "comedy disguised as wisdom" and "wisdom disguised as comedy."

        As the Swami, Steve is the author of Driving Your Own Karma (1989), When You See a Sacred Cow, Milk It For All It's Worth (1993), Duck Soup for the Soul (1999) and Swami for Precedent: A 7-Step Plan to Heal the Body Politic and Cure Electile Dysfunction (2004).

      •  

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

      • Aftermath

         

        Clinton’s Report from Italy 7 May 2013

        This is an attempt to share some of the impact and realizations residing in me after the first eight months of being on the Gaian Road Team. Of course, attempting to share this with you approaches absurdity because I am ongoingly and even now changing through Gaian Road Team processes. Nonetheless, even this statement is part of my sharing, because, perhaps that quality more than anything else is a prerequisite for being on the Team: the willingness to be ongoingly reinvented.

         

        After all, we are Gaia in action (we are each and all, everyone, and every living thing on Earth, Gaia in action) and if nothing else, Gaia is evolution, manifesting more and more consciousness.

         

        And this begins my report, because evolution is what I have experienced, not only in the stunning diversity in geology, plants and animals (including insects, because insects are animals!), but also in the diversity of the human expressions of love, play, and the unconditional commitment to self-and-planetary social transformations being birthed as the emergence of next culture, Archiarchy.

         

        By allowing ourselves as Gaian Road Team members to expand beyond mere reason, and to be moved into nonlinear actions by personal desires and impulses, by surprising suggestions and proposals from others, by mere 'coincidence' and happenstance from E.C.C.O. (Earth Coincidence Control Office), as well as by the outcomes of Gaian Road Team group process, we ongoingly and still encounter the courageous fringe-genius Edgeworkers hidden in plain sight, working whole heartedly as their destiny in action, their 5-body group intelligence in action, their bright principles and archetypal lineages in action, whether they would language it this way or not.

         

        In fact, one of the most consistent and impactful feedback messages we are receiving from so many of the people interviewed is profuse gratitude for the space of listening we give people to speak into. They exclaim, “That’s a good question!” and adamantly encourage us to continue our work, weaving connections between next-culture villagers. We somehow manage to cause them to feel more inspired, filled with unexpected energy. Over and over again they confirm and assert the value and crucial importance of the Gaian Road Team’s mission: to establish critical connections between communities of sustainable thoughtware practice, thereby strengthening the field of influence for the emergence of next culture.

         

        One of the catalytic seed-ideas we are planting wherever we go is: it is important and possible High Level Fun for tiny to small groups of people to declare themselves as a new country, a 'sustainability zone', a nanonation, a next-culture gameworld that is distinct from all the surrounding dominant cultures but in no way isolated. Through establishing themselves as an energetic configuration of commitment emerging from a particular and agreed upon context, they establish new space in the global ethnosphere and serve as a seed crystal of next culture that others can more easily follow.

         

        We are witnessing individuals reclaim their authority to choose what culture they live in. Suddenly they no longer need to wait in hopeless frustration for a 'critical mass' of people to download next culture thoughtware before they can live in next culture together themselves. Instead they can enjoy living in the quality of culture their heart and soul desires right now, and they never have to stop and adapt to systems and paradigms that are not sustainable even when they are surrounded by them.

         

        Meeting so many fellows - so many men and women working together in projects, hacking reality, playing full out, stepping into not-knowing-how and bringing their vision to life for the mutual benefit of all - we receive confirmation that a bright future for humanity is indeed being created. The massive successes which the Gaian Road Team is uncovering in the farthest reaches of the world - in education evolution, 3-Phase Healing modalities, economic transformations, new meeting technologies, and ongoing adulthood and archetypal initiations - are simply not reported in modern culture’s evening news. But a diverse and mutually beneficial global meshwork of next-culture communities of practice is rapidly growing, joyously real, and exquisitely tangible.

         

        Perhaps most surprising to me, personally, is the discovery that after all my decades of lone-wolf single-fighter edgework experiments bringing Possibility Management to life through Expand The Box trainings, Possibility Labs and the Trainer Path, through Brückendorf, through the books and S.P.A.R.K.s, through the many Possibility Teams and Women’s Circles and Men’s Circles, is that for all this time, I was not actually a lone wolf. I had just simply not yet reached out to meet and visit my friends before now.

         

        It is a profound and transformational experience for me to discover that I have so many friends.

      •  

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

         

      • Gaian Road Team Experiments

        Gaia is the specific field of consciousness of Earth.

        She is there for you. She is you.

        There are ways for you to connect in, listen in, feel in, and respond to Her.

        Dare you become this wild?

      • StartOver.xyz

        NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code GAIAROAD.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!
